home.headline: Movio
home.copy: Private driver trip requests. Publish your route, receive offers, and pick the best one — on your terms.
home.stepsTitle: Three steps. No hidden flat fares.
home.stepsLead: Movio is a marketplace: customers define the trip, drivers compete with clear offers.
home.step1Body: Pickup, drop-off, time, and flight or luggage details.
home.step2Body: Verified drivers send price and conditions.
home.step3Body: Compare and accept. Your booking is ready.

auth.loginHint: Demo: cliente@movio.app / motorista@movio.app / admin@movio.app — password movio123
auth.registerLead: Choose whether you want to request trips or send offers.
auth.name: Name

how.title: How Movio works
how.lead: A private-driver marketplace: customers publish, drivers propose, customers decide.

forDrivers.title: Drive with Movio
forDrivers.lead: Browse open requests in your area, send offers at your price, and grow with reviews.
